channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Sinkhole rescue in Norfolk, Virginia
item.description: A police officer rescued a driver in Norfolk, Virginia, after the driver's car fell into a water-filled sinkhole.

item.title: Watch: World Cup history being made
item.description: The U.S. men's national team, called the 'golden generation' along with Egypt and Ivory Coast, advances to the knockout round for the first time.

item.title: The Day My Mother Never Came Home
item.description: A son questions if his father used him as an alibi for murder, grappling with his parents' troubled history. '48 Hours' contributor Vladimir Duthiers reports.

item.title: Letlow wins Louisiana GOP Senate runoff, AP projects
item.description: Louisiana voters went to the polls Saturday for the Republican Senate runoff, with two candidates vying to replace Sen. Bill Cassidy, who failed to secure enough votes.
